lines.chords: C | C | C | C | Dm | Dm | G7 | G7 |

lines.lyrics: Birds fly by riding the breeze
Like the way they talk among the leaves.
Remember when I wrote you a song
Our world could never break our love so strong.
Life’s a fight.  Love’s a long long flight.  See you tonight.  By the pull of the moon.
Life’s a fight.  You are the brightest light.  I need you tonight.  Your love is alive.

lines.chords: F | Am | G | E7 | F | Am | G | E7 |
lines.lyrics: Fly away by darling dove.  Your silhouette soars in skies above.

lines.chords: F | Am | G | E7 | F | Am | G | G |
lines.lyrics: Fly away by darling dove.  My heart beats with your wings my love.
Am I the one in between?
Wanna be the one you always need.
Am I the one who lives in your dreams?
Life’s a fight.  Love’s a long long flight.  See you tonight.  By the pull of the moon.
Life’s a fight.  You are the brightest light.  I need you tonight.  Your love is alive.

lines.lyrics: Fly away by darling dove.  Your silhouette soars in skies above.
